rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields the better PR: it correctly identifies that the construction (inv_mul_cancel via the single rTensor antipode lemma + bialgebra-to-Hopf generalization, plus mapValue at the monoid level) is already at the right generality with no extraneous assumptions or specializations, and doing nothing extra preserves that. Review 2's demanded companion lemma is real but a minor unused symmetry nit (the code only ever needs S*id=1 for the Group instance), not material to generality or maintainer priorities, so forcing the edit makes the result no better (or slightly worse via added clutter).
